summary: Stellar performance captured in excellent audio, delivering a memorable night.
review: Both reviewers rave about the show, calling it great and unforgettable, and they praise the recording as awesome quality with clear, powerful sound. One reviewer even attended the concert, confirming that the live energy translates well to this high‑fidelity capture.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 5 stars and highlight a great performance plus excellent audio, indicating a top‑tier show and recording despite the small sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as 'great' and 'awesome quality'; no specific issues or source details are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed commentary on set structure; reviewers simply note it was a great, memorable show.
